steps.action: The Danza de los viejitos (Spanish: Dance of the with weight transfer through footwork, pivot turn, hold hands, partner opposite, accent beat, grounded.
steps.text: The Danza de los viejitos (Spanish: Dance of the with weight transfer through footwork, pivot turn, hold hands, partner opposite, accent beat, grounded.

steps.action: The men that perform this dance are known as Dan
steps.text: The men that perform this dance are known as Danzantes or "Dancers.

steps.action: " This dance was performed by four men that repr
steps.text: " This dance was performed by four men that represent fire, water, earth, and air.

steps.action: Four dancers are also believed to be the correct
steps.text: Four dancers are also believed to be the correct number to dance in this traditional performance because there are four colors that make corn which is red, yellow, white, and blue.

steps.action: The dancers ask El Dios Viejo (The Old God) for
steps.text: The dancers ask El Dios Viejo (The Old God) for good harvest, communication with spirits, and to learn about the past or to predict the future.

steps.action: Their shoes are sandals that have a wooden sole
steps.text: Their shoes are sandals that have a wooden sole in order to make a tapping noise throughout their dance, followed by a wooden cane they also use.

steps.action: The dancers also wear a mask made out of either
steps.text: The dancers also wear a mask made out of either wood, cornstalk paste, or clay with an elderly man's face painted on it.

steps.action: It is topped with a "sarape," which is a blanket
steps.text: It is topped with a "sarape," which is a blanket worn as a cloak in Latin America.

steps.action: Each sarape contains different designs and color
steps.text: Each sarape contains different designs and colors.

steps.action: They wear a hat made out of straw with adorned l
steps.text: They wear a hat made out of straw with adorned lengthy pieces of ribbon, each one a different color.

steps.action: The ribbon is parted down the middle of the hat,
steps.text: The ribbon is parted down the middle of the hat, each one hanging 10 cm on the sides.
